<think>
The instruction requires determining citation and reference relationships among provided papers and presenting them in a specific JSON format. The relations structure is a mapping where each document has a list of references and citations. Since no citations were found for any document, the "Citation" lists will be empty. The "Reference" lists are populated with the titles provided in the records.
</think>
<answer>
{"final_answer": {"DOC1": {"Reference": ["[4]", "[14]", "[5]", "[8]", "[9]", "[16]", "[2]", "[13]", "[6]", "[7]", "[1]", "[3]", "[17]", "[10]"], "Citation": []}, "DOC2": {"Reference": ["[29]", "[30]", "[16]", "[6]", "[5]", "[28]", "[20]", "[32]", "[18]"], "Citation": []}, "DOC3": {"Reference": ["[Su et al., 2021]", "[Chen et al., 2023a]", "[kaiokendev, 2023]", "[Peng & Quesnelle, 2023]", "[Peng et al., 2023]", "[Dao, 2023]"], "Citation": []}}}
